projects.Title: QuoteTile
projects.Subtitle: Seek inspiration from quotes
projects.Description: QuoteTile is a simple app that shows inspiring quotes. Refresh quotes anytime, copy quotes to clipboard with one click, and share quotes anywhere.

projects.Subtitle: Seek inspiration from quotes
projects.Description: QuoteTile is a simple app that shows inspiring quotes. Refresh quotes anytime you like. Save your favorites and build your personal collection.

projects.Title: GDC Media Player
projects.Subtitle: Vibe-cooling media player
projects.Description: A lightweight and modern audio player designed for music lovers. Clean UI, smooth playback, and efficient performance.

projects.Title: ChrisRLillo Music
projects.Subtitle: Chilean music in its peak
projects.Description: Discover music, updates, and exclusive content from ChrisRLillo.

projects.Title: ConverterCalculatorGUI
projects.Subtitle: Scientific Calculator
projects.Description: A lightweight Windows application combining a scientific calculator and a currency converter. Built in C# WinForms, it’s perfect for everyday calculations and quick currency conversions.

projects.Title: Aero Quotes
projects.Subtitle: Quotes, Aerofied
projects.Description: This app displays a quote in an Aero Glass–style window using your system’s accent color or Mica effect, and fetches quotes from the Quotable API. It’s written in AutoHotkey v2.

projects.Title: GeekHub
projects.Subtitle: Your apps, projects, and updates in one place.
projects.Description: Welcome to GeekHub, your central place for exploring projects, updates, and creative ideas all in one space. Here you can browse the latest builds, read fresh updates, and discover what's being worked on in real time. GeekHub is designed to keep everything organized and easy to access, so you can quickly jump between projects and stay up to date with new releases and features.

projects.Title: DrayMusic
projects.Subtitle: Listen online, with DrayMusic
projects.Description: Listen online anytime, anywhere with DrayMusic and enjoy seamless access to your favorite tracks, curated playlists, and new music discoveries all in one place.
